hero.headlineHtml:
Wall Street works for Wall Street.
Not for you.
hero.subtitle: The AI-native financial assistant that works only for you — bringing the power of institutional-grade stock analysis to individual investors.
features.heading: Built for Modern Intelligent Investors
features.subtitle: What if you could invest alongside Buffett, Munger, and Lynch? Deep Values distills their playbooks into moat watchlists, intrinsic-value calculators, and interactive fundamental analysis — all in a single workflow.
features.slide1.title: Values Watchlist
features.slide1.bullet1: Intrinsic-value investors aren't price-watchers — we're value-watchers.
features.slide1.bullet2: Each value is colored against the thresholds Buffett, Munger, Greenblatt, and other legends actually used.
features.slide1.bullet3: Your whole watchlist resolves into a verdict at a glance.
features.slide2.title: Intrinsic Value Calculator
features.slide2.bullet1: Before you buy, know what it's worth.
features.slide2.bullet2: Three independent valuations — DCF, Owner Earnings, and Damodaran — cross-checked against peers.
features.slide2.bullet3: See at a glance where today's price sits: above, around, or below what it's worth.
features.slide3.title: Financials Deep Dive
features.slide3.bullet1: The truth about a business is in its full financial history.
features.slide3.bullet2: Every income, expense, cash flow, and balance-sheet line — the company's full history, sourced straight from SEC filings.
features.slide3.bullet3: Easy to watch, easy to track.
features.slide4.title: Smart Money & Gurus
features.slide4.bullet1: See which legends own a stock, how big the bet is, and how it shifted quarter over quarter.
features.slide4.bullet2: QoQ deltas surface fresh conviction and quiet exits before they hit the headlines.
features.slide4.bullet3: Tap a name to read their full thesis and follow their next move.
features.slide5.title: Filings & Earnings
features.slide5.bullet1: Every 8-K, 10-Q, and 10-K lands within an hour of EDGAR — never miss a filing.
features.slide5.bullet2: Jump straight to the earnings audio, transcript, and investor relations page.
features.slide5.bullet3: We don't host the audio — links open YouTube, Seeking Alpha, or the company's IR, so the source stays original.
intelligence.heading: Intelligence That Only Aligns With You.
intelligence.subtitle: Other apps profit when you trade. DeepValues.AI is built to make you a better investor — reading every filing, weighing the evidence, and showing its sources so you can trust the verdict instead of the confetti.
intelligence.slide2.desc: Voice or text. Always with sources.
intelligence.slide3.desc: Reads every filing and call — conviction in minutes.
intelligence.slide4.headlineHtml: Reads every word, surfaces what matters.
intelligence.slide4.desc: Distilled to what moves the thesis.
intelligence.slide6.desc: The AI rebuilds the full income statement as a single Sankey — segment revenue, cost of revenue, operating expenses, taxes, all the way to net income. One look tells you where the money comes from and where it goes.

pricing.honest: The credits you spend are the actual cost of running a multi-analyst AI research pipeline on your behalf. No advertiser kickbacks. No promoted stocks. No affiliate links inside our briefings. The product works only as well as it's useful to you — because that's the only way we make money.
faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about DeepValues.AI — what it is, who it's for, and how the research works.
faq.a1: DeepValues.AI is an AI-native financial assistant for individual investors. It runs multi-analyst AI research on any US-listed stock — reading every SEC filing, earnings transcript, and 13F holding — and produces a structured briefing with intrinsic value, financial deep-dive, smart-money positioning, and recent filings. Built by LuLu Ventures LLC and aligned only with the individual investor: no advertiser kickbacks, no promoted stocks, no conflicts of interest.
faq.a2: Individual retail investors who want institutional-grade stock research without paying Bloomberg or FactSet prices. Especially useful if you follow a value-investing approach — the product is built around the methods of Buffett, Munger, Greenblatt, and other legends — but it works for anyone doing fundamental analysis on US stocks.
faq.q3: How is DeepValues.AI different from Yahoo Finance, Seeking Alpha, or Robinhood?
faq.a3: Yahoo Finance gives you raw data. Seeking Alpha gives you crowd-sourced opinions. Robinhood is a broker that profits when you trade. DeepValues.AI is none of those — it's research the user pays for (so we work for you, not for advertisers), generated by AI that reads the actual SEC filings end-to-end, with sources cited on every claim. We don't sell your data, don't promote stocks, and don't get paid when you trade.
faq.q4: What does a research briefing include?
faq.a4: A typical briefing covers: business moat analysis, intrinsic value from three independent models (DCF, Owner Earnings, Damodaran method) cross-checked against peers, full financial history sourced from SEC filings, smart-money positioning (which of 29 tracked legendary investors hold the stock and how that's changed quarter over quarter), and a How-It-Makes-Money Sankey diagram. Every claim links back to the source filing or transcript.
faq.a5: Buffett Lens is a voice-and-text conversational AI grounded in a specific company's public disclosures. Ask it anything — "how did revenue mix change last quarter?" or "what did management say about AI capex on the last call?" — and it answers with citations to the exact filing or transcript section. Voice audio is processed in real time through Microsoft Azure Speech Services and never stored.
faq.a6: No. DeepValues.AI is an AI research and education product, not a registered investment adviser. AI briefings are factual research and analysis; they are not personalized investment recommendations. You are responsible for your own investment decisions. Every output cites its source so you can verify what the AI tells you.
faq.a7: Basic is free forever (30 credits per week, 7-stock watchlist, Buffett Lens text plus 3 voice queries). Plus is $9.99/month with a 7-day free trial (15-stock watchlist, track 10 gurus, unlimited Buffett Lens text). Pro is $29.99/month (100 credits/week, unlimited watchlist, all 29 gurus with real-time alerts, 30 minutes of voice per month). API access is $99/month for developers and advisors. Credit top-up packs are available.
faq.a8: Yes. We don't sell personal data. We don't use your inputs or chats to train any AI model (ours or our vendors'). Voice audio is never stored — it's streamed to Microsoft Azure for real-time transcription only, then discarded. You can export or delete your account in one click. Full details in the Privacy Policy.
